trails.name: Wairake Track
trails.description: This is the shorter and less steep route to the summit of Mt Karioi.  The track crosses private farmland before climbing through native bush.

trails.name: Bridal Veil Falls Walk- Wheelchair Sect
Bryant Memorial Reserve tracks
trails.description: Two short walking tracks leaving from the Bryant Memorial Reserves.

trails.name: Karioi summit tracks
trails.description: Karioi is an ancient volcano and the views from the summit  are spectacular.

trails.name: Wairēinga/Bridal Veil Falls
trails.description: Walk to the top and down to the base of these spectacular 55 m falls.

trails.name: Bridal Veil Falls Walk  Wheelchair Sect
Pukekohe Five Summits Trail
trails.description: “To mark five decades of our club’s members tramping the hills all over New Zealand, we have created the Five Summits Trail, which circumnavigates central Pukekohe.   It includes the five local hills, which are interesting geological features, to offer good views that highlight both the urban area and rural surrounds.”
